title: The current story of human evolution may be incomplete - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses limitations in the current scientific understanding of human evolution. He suggests that prevailing narratives about human evolutionary history may be missing important elements or misinterpreting available evidence. The discussion implies that novel findings or alternative interpretations could reshape the field.
